Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This service provides information about the current location of the smart phone that will be carried by the truck drivers during shipment delivery

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Note
Column.value: This mobile app will be installed on truck drivers’ smart phones to allow the shipping managers and partners to track the location of the truck at any moment of time.

Column.name: Notes
Column.value: This diagram shows the context of the Tracking App Application Component. It describes what the application component is, what does it provide, who will use it, what other applications will integrate with it, and what does it need to operate
